name: Feeds
description: Adds configured catalog feed source validation for skills and plugins.

sources.description: Catalog feed sources used for curated skill and plugin discovery.

url.description: Absolute https:// or file:// feed document URL.

enabled.description: Enable this feed source. Defaults to true.

trust.description: Whether this source is accepted unsigned or pinned by integrity hash.

integrity.description: Optional sha256:<hex> hash for pinned feed documents.
